allow: Bash(# Check what departure date is stored for the JFK-TLV flight in Firestore firebase firestore:get trackedFlights/3vfboAeR3V6PGZ1rJO7L || \\ firebase firestore:get --project elev-flight-tracker trackedFlights/3vfboAeR3V6PGZ1rJO7L || \\ echo ""Trying different approach..."" # Get it via curl to the REST API curl -s ""https://firestore.googleapis.com/v1/projects/elev-flight-tracker/databases/\(default\)/documents/trackedFlights/3vfboAeR3V6PGZ1rJO7L"" 2>&1 | python3 -c "" import sys, json try: d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) fields = d.get\(''fields'', {}\) for k, v in fields.items\(\): val = list\(v.values\(\)\)[0] if v else None print\(f''{k}: {val}''\) except Exception as e: print\(''error:'', e\) print\(sys.stdin.read\(\)[:500]\) "" 2>&1)

Bash(# Check if Firebase Functions supports Python runtime curl -s ""https://cloud.google.com/functions/docs/concepts/execution-environment"" || true # More practically - check what Python versions Firebase Functions v2 supports firebase functions:list 2>&1)
